message:
fix(autograd,api): add shape validation to tensor_where, harden backward passes with overflow checks, and expand gradient coverage

Forward pass validation (ft-api):
- tensor_where now validates that condition, x, and y all have the same
  shape before proceeding, returning IncompatibleSet error on mismatch.
  Previously, mismatched shapes would silently produce incorrect results
  or index out of bounds during element-wise selection.
- New test: session_tensor_where_rejects_shape_mismatch

Backward pass hardening (ft-autograd):
- Replace unchecked shape.iter().product() with checked_shape_numel() in
  multiple backward pass paths: Flip, Roll, Where, and expand operations
- tensor_where backward now validates gradient length matches expected
  numel via ensure_tensor_len before processing
- tensor_where backward routing: condition gradient is always zero (no
  gradient flows through discrete selection), x gradient receives incoming
  gradient where condition is true, y gradient where condition is false
- Expand backward now uses checked arithmetic for output shape computation
- Various backward passes gain explicit overflow error propagation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
